calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Vacated

Plaintiff Dennis Bishop'S Motion For Order 1. Deeming Admitted Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions; 2. To Compel Defendants Verified Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories, Special Rogs And Request For Production:(Added To Calendar For Issuance Of Tentative Ruling Only)
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order 1. Deeming Admitted Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions; 2. To Compel Defendants Verified Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories, Special Rogs And Request For Production
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DENNIS BISHOP's Motion For Order 1. Deeming Admitted Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions; 2. To Compel Defendants Verified Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories, Special Rogs And Request For Production:

NO OPPOSTION WAS FILED TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED AND TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SET ONE, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET ON. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTIONS AS FOLLOWS:

1. WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDANT WILL SERVE PLAINTIFF, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, CODE COMPLIANT VERIFIED RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION NO 1 - 26. FAILURE OF DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH THIS ORDER WITHIN THE TIME PERIOD SPECIFIED AS TO ANY SPECIFIC REQUEST FOR ADMISSION, SAID ADMISSION WILL BE DEEMED TO HAVE BEEN ADMITTED FOR ALL PURPOSES IN THIS LITIGATION AND DEFFENDAT WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM SEEKING TO INTRODUCE ANY EVIDENCE CONTRARY TO THE ADMISSION.
2. WITHIN THIRTY DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDANT WILL SERVE PLAINTIFF, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, FULL AND COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO EACH AN EVERY SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NOS 1 - 22
3. WITHIN THIRTY (30) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDANT WILL SERVE PLAINTIFF, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, FULL AND COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO ALL FORM INTERROGATORIES MARKED WITH AN "X".
4. WITHIN THIRTY (30) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDAT WILL SERVE PLAINTIFF, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, VERIFIED RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS NO. 1 - 24 AND WILL PRODUCE COPIES OF SAID DOCUMENTS TO PLAINTIFF
5. THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONTETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,680.00 PAYMENT OF WHICH SHOULD BE MADE BY DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFF AND HIS COUNSEL WIITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2020 Set For Trial On Oct-12-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Nathan Putney from Hillman Lucas & Canning, (707) 427-7377 - appearing on behalf of plaintiff Dennis B. Bishop via CourtCall.
Self-represented defendant Kalvin L. Bishop appearing in person on his own behalf.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DENNIS BISHOP Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-26-2021 Continued To Jan-29-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DENNIS BISHOP's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter transferred to department 501 to be heard on January 29, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all rent disputes per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
